commands.summary: 30 tests pass, including new regressions test_cli_spec_fails_cleanly_without_spec_file (F-001) and test_check_frozen_detects_working_tree_change (F-002).
F-001 fixed: prints maintainer-command guidance and exits 1 instead of raising FileNotFoundError.
F-002 fixed: a working-tree edit to a protected path is now detected (exit 1), not just committed changes.
